# displaysPostProcessApplicationControl

**Instance Property**

Specifies whether the post processing application control is displayed.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var displaysPostProcessApplicationControl: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

The post processing application is only relevant when the transfer mode is [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode/fileBased].

## Specifying a Post Processing Application

- **postProcessApplication**: The URL of the application to use for post processing of the scan.
